description_long: This bonsai features a slender, dark trunk that curves gently upward, supporting a radial arrangement of elongated, lanceolate leaves. The foliage is primarily green with some lighter, yellowish tips, suggesting new growth or natural color variation. The leaves are arranged in a somewhat sparse, open pattern, allowing visibility through the branches and creating a delicate, airy silhouette. The trunk is relatively thin and slightly arched, giving the bonsai a graceful, informal appearance. There is no visible pot or container, and the base of the trunk is exposed. The overall impression is of a young, lightly foliated bonsai, suitable for minimalist or modern urban settings.
description: A slender bonsai with a gently curved trunk and sparse, elongated green leaves arranged in a radial, airy pattern. The foliage features both mature green and lighter new growth.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full radial spread of the leaves and the central, slightly curved trunk.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thinness of the trunk and the horizontal extension of the leaves.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open, sparse arrangement of the leaves and the arch of the trunk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the leaf layering and the gentle curvature of the trunk.
attribute_pot_type: No pot is visible; the trunk base is exposed without a container.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is gently curved, following an informal upright style with a slight arch and no sharp twists.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are arranged in a radial, open pattern with moderate spacing, giving the bonsai an airy silhouette.
attribute_leaf_density: The foliage is sparse to moderate, with visible gaps between leaves and a light, open appearance.
